title: Fix Folder Dropdown CSS Readability in Light Mode
story: As a DataTools Pro user in light mode, I want the folder dropdown to be readable, so that I can use the filter without CSS rendering issues.
description: The folder dropdown CSS was making text unreadable in light mode. Investigation revealed the issue was caused by browser caching of stale CSS rather than a code defect. Resolved by clearing the browser cache.
acceptance_criteria: Folder dropdown text is readable in light mode
Dropdown styling is consistent between light and dark modes
implementation_notes: Issue was caused by browser caching, not a code defect. No code changes required.
comment_summary: Balaji could not reproduce. Ryan confirmed it was browser caching on his end.
